label: Synth (Tool Synthesis)
description: Dynamically synthesize and execute a tool from natural-language intent. Routes through the openagentic-api /api/synth/synthesize endpoint; high-risk synth pauses for approval.

settings.name: intent
settings.label: Intent
settings.description: Natural-language description of the tool to synthesize. When unset and input is a string, the input is used as the intent.

settings.name: capabilities
settings.label: Capabilities
settings.description: Capability tags constraining the synthesized tool (e.g. ['data', 'http']).

settings.name: dryRun
settings.label: Dry run
settings.description: When true, the tool is synthesized but not executed.

settings.name: credentials
settings.label: Credentials (advanced)
settings.description: Optional credential overrides forwarded to the synth pipeline.

ai.shortDescription: Synthesize and run a tool from natural-language intent.
ai.whenToUse: When the workflow needs an ad-hoc capability that isn't backed by an existing connector — e.g. 'fetch a weather forecast', 'translate a string', 'compute a checksum'.
ai.examplePrompt: synthesize a tool that fetches the current S&P 500 price
ai.promptHints: Provide a detailed `intent` describing what the tool should do. Use `capabilities` to constrain the surface area. High-risk synthesis pauses the flow with status='awaiting_approval'.

outputAssertions.name: non_empty_synth_output
outputAssertions.errorMessage: Synth node returned an empty toolName — synthesis produced no recognisable tool.

outputAssertions.name: synth_substantive_output
outputAssertions.expression: !result || result.status === 'awaiting_approval' || !((result.summary && result.summary.match(/^\s*(I (could not|couldn't|cannot|can't|do not have|don't have|am unable|wasn't able|was not able)|Sorry,? (I|but)|I'?m sorry,?|I apologize,?|Unfortunately,? (I|no)|No (information|data|results|content) (available|found))/i)) || (result.output && typeof result.output === 'string' && result.output.match(/^\s*(I (could not|couldn't|cannot|can't|do not have|don't have|am unable|wasn't able|was not able)|Sorry,? (I|but)|I'?m sorry,?|I apologize,?|Unfortunately,? (I|no)|No (information|data|results|content) (available|found))/i)))
outputAssertions.errorMessage: Synth node returned a refusal or 'no info' response.
